_comment: v4.1 life-strategy comparison. Each strategy couples a routing profile with a housing plan (rent vs buy-and-settle), a tax jurisdiction, and a healthcare posture. The engine runs the full Monte Carlo for each and ranks by survival — this is the 'optimal retirement strategy selector'.

housing._doc: Property price ≈ monthly_cost · rent_fraction · 12 · price_to_annual_rent. After buying, rent is removed from living cost and replaced by ownership_cost_rate · price (tax + maintenance). The home is an illiquid asset counted in terminal net worth but NOT in liquid survival.

healthcare._doc: Age-rising out-of-pocket medical cost drawn each year, plus a rising-probability tail event. Insurance dampens the tail.

tax._doc: Annual drag subtracted from real return. Offshore (HK/SG) custody carries less friction than onshore for this profile.
